category_sources: source_facts.description says command-line interface to libgphoto2; official gphoto2 manual describes gphoto2 as a command-line client for libgphoto2.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gphoto2; official gPhoto documentation and GitHub repository use gphoto2.
docs_sources: Official gPhoto manual page documents the gphoto2 CLI; official gPhoto site hosts the manual.
repo_sources: Official gPhoto site says code hosting migrated to GitHub; official GitHub repository gphoto/gphoto2 describes the gphoto2 command-line tool.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies the libgphoto2 CLI; official manual says gphoto2 is a command-line client for libgphoto2.
